feedback_files.tests/test_repair_feedback.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def test_writer_uses_the_canonical_permission_bits():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    connection.executescript((ROOT / "db/schema.sql").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    grant_sql = (ROOT / "db/grant_permissions.sql").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    connection.execute(
        grant_sql,
        {"id": "writer", "can_read": 0, "can_write": 1, "is_admin": 0},
    )
    connection.execute(
        grant_sql,
        {"id": "admin", "can_read": 0, "can_write": 0, "is_admin": 1},
    )
    masks = dict(connection.execute("SELECT id, permission_mask FROM principals"))
    assert masks == {"writer": 2, "admin": 4}
